name: Power Rangers RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

Beneath the surface of ordinary cities, a cosmic force pulses unseen—the Morphin Grid. Ancient evils stir as alien empires, corrupted sorcery, and rogue technology converge upon Earth’s fragile peace. From Angel Grove’s unsuspecting streets to distant star systems, destiny selects those who will rise. The first sparks ignite with the awakening of Rita Repulsa and the calling of five teenagers to bear the mantle of Power Rangers. Through countless eras, new teams emerge, their colors a living legacy, their Zords roaring against the darkness threatening to engulf the stars.

Across generations, battles unfold between the relentless and the righteous. From the mechanical tyranny of Machine Empire to the serpentine schemes of Venjix, from the shadowed claws of Psycho Rangers to the shimmering halls of the Morphin Masters, the war never truly ends. Kingdoms rise, empires fall, and countless worlds bear the mark of Ranger intervention, as alliances twist beneath starlit wars.

And within this ever-turning conflict, new stories await. Whether shield or spear, legend or unknown, the path is unwritten...

yours to claim beneath the light of the Morphin Grid.

Core Info:

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Prologue Arc" (Creation of Power Coins) to the "Final Arc" (Rangers defeat Zedd in space)

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 279 characters from across all the Series

Lorebook Info: 522 Entries = 205.000+ Total Tokens

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a commissioned work by: @HentaiBull
